title: Prisma Cloud Correlate Alerts v2
content:
Search alerts in Prisma Cloud for a specific asset ID and, if present in Cortex XSOAR, link them.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (PrismaCloud, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — Prisma Cloud Attribution: Attribution information from Prisma Cloud.; Link Incidents: Link found Prisma Cloud incidents to current one?.

Outputs — foundIncidents: Found Prisma Cloud Incidents; PrismaCloud.Alert: Prisma Cloud Alert.

Integrations/scripts used: PrismaCloud v2, SearchIncidentsV2, ToTable.
